Episodes.Title: Deadly Exchange
Episodes.Actors: Jessica Allen, Jefferson Brown, Gabriel Burrafato
Episodes.Plot: On 19 October 2004, Corporate Airlines Flight 5966, operating for AmericanConnection, crashes short of the runway while on approach to Kirksville Regional Airport in Missouri, killing 13 of the 15 people on board.

Episodes.Title: Mixed Signals
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Ian Connacher
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Tyler Murree, François Macdonald
Episodes.Plot: On 8 February 1989, Independent Air Flight 1851 crashes into the Pico Alto mountain while on approach to Santa Maria Airport in the Azores, killing all 144 occupants.

Episodes.Title: Pressure Point
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Mark Miller
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Shinobu Yoshioka, Shinji Suzuki
Episodes.Plot: Slamming into a mountain, Japan Airlines 123 becomes the deadliest single aircraft accident in history, and threatens to ground 747s worldwide.

Episodes.Title: Power Play
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, James Burke, Brandon Ludwig
Episodes.Plot: On 13 October 2011, Airlines PNG Flight 1600 loses engine power and crash-lands in a densely forested area near the Gogol River in Madang Province, Papua New Guinea. Only 4 of the 32 passengers and crew members survive the crash.

Episodes.Title: Control Catastrophe
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Laurel Baker
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Mladen Obradovic, Godfrey Giocada
Episodes.Plot: Air Astana Flight 1388 was a repositioning flight from Lisbon to Almaty, On 11 November 2018, shortly after takeoff it suffered severe control issues. After 90 minutes it landed safely at Beja Airbase with the help of PAF F-16s

Episodes.Title: Cockpit Catastrophe
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Lara Fitzgerald
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Fane Tse, Albert Chung
Episodes.Plot: On 14 May 2018, Sichuan Airlines Flight 8633 makes an emergency landing at Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport after suffering an explosion decompression. The co-pilot was partially sucked out, but all 128 people on board surv...

Episodes.Title: Dream Flight Disaster
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Jerome Bourgault, Krista Morin
Episodes.Plot: On 31 December 2017, a light aircraft configured as a float-plane veers off course and crashes near Sydney, Australia, shortly after take-off. All 6 people on board, including the UK billionaire Richard Cousins, are killed.

Episodes.Title: Deadly Deception
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alex Bystram
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Arthur Moukhortov, Mikhail Bronnikov
Episodes.Plot: Bulgarian Airlines Flight 013 is hijacked. The crew and authorities devise a daring scheme to get the violent hijackers to believe that their demands have been met, before the aircraft runs out of fuel.

Episodes.Title: Delivery to Disaster
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Lara Fitzgerald
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Neil Girvan, Michael Brown
Episodes.Plot: An Amazon cargo plane dives into a swamp outside of Houston, USA. The collected evidence eventually leads investigators to a pilot with a long history of failures and errors.

Episodes.Title: Mystery Over the Mediterranean
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Islam Balbaa, Samy Osman
Episodes.Plot: Evidence from the disappearance of EgyptAir Flight 804 leads investigators to theorize different causes for the plane's spiral into the Mediterranean.
